PETITION FOR REMOVAL OF ADMINISTRATOR CONTINUED FROM APR-12-2005 TO JUN-06-2005 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 204 FOR RESOLUTION OF THE CREDITOR'S CLAIM ISSUE. COURT IS NOT MAKING A RULING ON THE CREDITOR'S CLAIM ISSUE. THE ADMINISTRATOR IS TO FILE A PETITION FOR FINAL DISTRIBUTION OR STATUS REPORT ON ADMINISTRATION BY 06/06/05. IF THE CREDITOR'S CLAIM ISSUE IS NOT RESOLVED, BOTH SIDES TO FILE STATUS STATEMENTS BY 05/23/05. COURT WILL RULE ON THIS ISSUE IF IT IS NOT RESOLVED PER COURT
WAIVER OF ACCOUNTING THREE WAIVERS OF ACCOUNTING FILED BY PETITIONER WESTON, HOWARD L

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR FILING A PETITION FOR FINAL DISTRIBUTION OR STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION, CALENDAR OF JUN-06-2005, OFF CALENDAR ; TENTATIVE RULING IS INTEREST ON ALLOWED PORTION OF CLAIM IS DENIED. INTEREST ON JUDGMENT HAS BEEN PAID. THAT ISSUE IS RESOLVED. ATTORNEY FEE FOR THIS PETITION IS DENIED. COURT CAN NOT SEE ANY BENEFIT TO THE ESTATE. MR. NEMER ARGUED THE ATTORNEY FEE ISSUE. MR. SULLIVAN RESPONDED. COURT'S TENTATIVE RULING STANDS PER COURT
